title: Olympia Washington Association of Disability Examiners (OlyWADE) — Constitution & By-Laws
description: Constitution and by-laws of the Olympia Washington Association of Disability Examiners (OlyWADE), a NADE chapter in the Pacific Region whose membership is drawn primarily from the Olympia office of the Washington State Division of Disability Determination Services (DDDS). Covers name, affiliation, purpose, definitions, classes of membership, meetings, officers, executive board, IRS 501(c)(6) limitations, by-laws, amendments, committees, voting/elections, rules of order, and an impeachment-of-officer process. Includes a roster of OlyWADE officers effective January 2010 through January 2013.
geographic_coverage: Olympia, Washington (Washington State DDDS Olympia office)

source.publisher: National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) — Olympia Washington (OlyWADE) Chapter
source.title: Olympia Washington Association of Disability Examiners Constitution & By-Laws

notes: Authoritative: this is the markitdown-normalized markdown conversion of the sibling source document OlyWADE-constitution-and-bylaws.doc. The governing document is marked 'Filed 5/07' with 'Rev 6/5/07'; an appended officer roster runs from January 2010 through January 2013, so temporal_coverage is set start 2007-05 (filing) to 2013-01 (latest officer list). 'WADE'/'OWADE' typos for OlyWADE appear in the converted text. Related to the NADE regional constitutions/bylaws link index.
